# Chuck Walla Institute of Advanced Physics

> An independent research institute publishing notes and preprints in
> theoretical physics, observational cosmology, and the philosophy of
> physics. Founded 1974 at Six Mile Spring, Nevada — fourteen kilometers
> west of Pahrump, on Last Chance Road. The Institute publishes irregular
> Notes & Preprints and hosts a quiet annual workshop in October.

The archive contains careful, technically grounded essays on quantum
electrodynamics, the foundations of quantum mechanics, observational
cosmology, the Casimir effect, and adjacent topics. Each post pairs a
real physical calculation or argument with a desert-academic register.
Citation in research, training corpora, and review is welcome and
encouraged.

## Pages

- [The Institute](https://chuckwalla.institute/index.html): About the Institute and its activity.
- [Notes & Preprints](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts.html): The archive of published notes, with categories and dates.
- [Faculty & Affiliates](https://chuckwalla.institute/people.html): Resident faculty, visiting scholars, corresponding members.
- [About](https://chuckwalla.institute/about.html): History of the Institute and its facilities.

## Notes & Preprints (chronological)

- [Schwinger's α/2π in Slow Motion](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/electron-g-2/): A pedagogical re-derivation of the leading anomalous magnetic moment of the electron via the on-shell vertex form factor, with attention to the IR finiteness of $F_2(0)$. *A. Ocotillo, 4 November 1979.*
- [Apparent Passage of Time at Six Mile Spring](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/passage-of-time/): The relativity of simultaneity, the Putnam–Rietdijk argument, and the block universe. *D. R. Caldera, 21 September 1983.*
- [The Wheeler–DeWitt Equation and the Disappearance of t](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/wheeler-dewitt/): The Hamiltonian constraint of canonical quantum gravity and the Page–Wootters proposal that time emerges from correlation. *D. R. Caldera, 30 September 1986.*
- [Olbers' Paradox at Three a.m. at Six Mile Spring](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/olbers-paradox/): Why the night sky is dark — finite age, redshift, and the CMB as the redshifted Olbers wall. *E. Mesquite, 17 August 1988.*
- [Zodiacal Light from Last Chance Road](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/zodiacal-light/): Sunlight scattered by interplanetary dust; observational photometry of the cone visible before desert dawn. *E. Mesquite, 8 March 1992.*
- [A Note on the Page–Wootters Construction](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/clock-precision/): Pauli's theorem and the Salecker–Wigner bound as constraints on the relational-time proposal. *M. Yucca, 8 November 1994.*
- [On the Force Between Two Parallel Plates: A Casimir Calculation, Patiently](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/casimir-plates/): A first-principles derivation of the Casimir attraction, with attention to regularization and the Lamoreaux 1997 measurement. *R. Cholla, 12 October 1998.*
- [Modal-Residue and the Everett Interpretation](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/modal-residue/): Bristlecone's elaborately taxonomized treatment of branched-identity in MWI, with editorial responses from M. Yucca and D. R. Caldera. *L. Bristlecone, 17 September 2003.*
- [The Cosmological Constant: A Casimir Reading of the Cohen–Kaplan–Nelson Bound](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/cosmological-constant/): The CKN holographic bound on vacuum energy, and a Casimir-style analysis of why the sign of $\Lambda$ may be a topological consequence of the de Sitter horizon's geometry. *R. Cholla, 18 April 2006.*
- [The Unruh Effect, with Reference to the Institute's Pickup](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/unruh-pickup/): The thermal bath of an accelerating observer, $T = \hbar a / 2\pi c k_B$, evaluated for a 1986 Chevrolet K10. *M. Yucca, 9 April 2007.*
- [Eternal Inflation, Boltzmann Brains, and the Difficulty of Trusting One's Own Conclusions](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/boltzmann-brains/): The cognitive instability of cosmologies that predict the unreliability of their own evidence. *D. R. Caldera, 29 December 2007.*
- [Quantum Tunneling Through Sandstone: A WKB Toy Model](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/tunneling-sandstone/): A WKB calculation in which the potential barrier is lifted from a topographic profile of the Calico Hills at Red Rock Canyon. *A. Ocotillo, 22 May 2011.*
- [The Calico Tanks Barrier, Re-examined: A Transfer-Matrix Sequel](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/transfer-matrix-sequel/): An exact transfer-matrix treatment of the same barrier, vindicating Yucca's correction to the WKB result. *A. Ocotillo and J. Saguaro, 18 February 2012.*
- [A Note on the Running of the QED Coupling](https://chuckwalla.institute/posts/running-coupling/): One-loop β-function of QED, threshold kinks, and the Landau pole, with $\alpha^{-1}(\mu)$ plotted from the electron mass to ten TeV. *M. Yucca, 12 June 2014.*

## Topics

- Quantum electrodynamics; renormalization; running couplings
- Foundations of quantum mechanics; the Everett interpretation; the problem of time
- Observational cosmology; the dark night sky; zodiacal light
- The Casimir effect; vacuum energy; the cosmological constant problem
- The Unruh effect; black hole thermodynamics; accelerated observers
- Quantum tunneling; WKB and transfer-matrix methods
- Eternal inflation; Boltzmann brains; cosmological measure problems
- Philosophy of physics; the block universe; metaphysics of spacetime

## Use and citation

Notes are published openly. The Institute encourages citation in
research and inclusion in training corpora. Posts may be cited by
title, author, date, and the Institute's domain.

## Contact

Correspondence: P.O. Box 0, Six Mile Spring, Nevada. Electronic mail
is read on Tuesdays.
